name: harness-multiagents
description: Harness multi-agent orchestration system: TDD, multi-layer code review (logic/security/performance), E2E workflow from requirements to delivery. 64 composable skills.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent orchestration with TDD, code review, and E2E delivery workflows
interface.longDescription: Harness provides a complete multi-agent software development system. Use it to orchestrate development through ideation, design, decomposition, TDD-based execution, multi-layer code review (logic, security, performance), merge, integration testing, and delivery. Human judgment is the ultimate backstop on strategic decisions while AI agents handle execution, review, and verification.
defaultPrompt: I have a new requirement I'd like to develop with the Harness workflow.
Start the multi-agent pipeline for this feature.
Review this code with all three reviewers: logic, security, and performance.
Set up the Harness development environment for this project.
